paper_title: AlexaTM 20B: Few-Shot Learning Using a Large-Scale Multilingual Seq2Seq Model

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces the largest multilingual seq2seq model (20B parameters) capable of few-shot in-context learning through a hybrid denoising-CLM pre-training strategy. Unlike prior seq2seq models limited to denoising-only training, AlexaTM 20B leverages both objectives for improved generalization and efficiency, achieving SOTA on summarization, translation, and multilingual reasoning tasks
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Wikipedia + mC4 (Arabic, English, French, German, Hindi, Italian, Japanese, Marathi, Portuguese, Spanish, Tamil, Telugu)
raw_extraction.application: Multilingual summarization, machine translation (low-resource languages), zero-shot reasoning, and in-context learning across 12 languages
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable few-shot learning for multilingual sequence-to-sequence tasks with long-context dependencies
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Discriminative fine-tuning for specific tasks (e.g., summarization, translation) via CLM mode with [CLM] prefix
raw_extraction.hardware_used: AWS p4d.24xlarge instances with DeepSpeed ZeRO Stage 3 for 154 TFLOPS/GPU throughput
raw_extraction.extension: Pre-layer normalization (Pre-LN) for enhanced training stability, fusion-in-decoder (FiD) support for multi-shot in-context learning, and initialization from a 10B encoder model
raw_extraction.paper_title: AlexaTM 20B: Few-Shot Learning Using a Large-Scale Multilingual Seq2Seq Model
